name: Raiders of the Lost Ark — Hyperalignment fMRI
description: fMRI responses from 11 young adults watching the full feature film 'Raiders of the Lost Ark' (~115 min). A foundational naturalistic dataset for functional hyperalignment, modeling shared representational geometry across brains during rich, socially complex viewing.
citation: Haxby JV, et al. (2011). A common, high-dimensional model of the representational space in human ventral temporal cortex. Neuron, 72(2), 404–416.
